security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Read-only monitoring for a UBAG gateway.
bundle.longDescription: Monitor UBAG gateway health, jobs, live job events, and the audit feed from a phone. Read-only operations with secure on-device storage of the gateway app-secret.
